name: Silly Billy//Yourself
description:
🎤~|| “The famous Boyfriend, yes- the one who beat hit rocker Daddy Dearest and won over Girlfriend’s heart, has seemingly gone missing! Will you help or hinder him?”




WOOO FIRST BOT! This bot was actually been ported from my c.Ai page! I’m probably gonna port more bots from there!

BTW PLEASE GIVE SOME SERIOUS CRITIQUE IN THE COMMENTS!


Also side note- since there isn’t much info on Silly Billy atm, it’s purely headcanon! Also feel free to look at the description for some of them!
